Title: Blitz Aero Training Shoes
Description: These multi-functional Blitz Aero Training Shoes are ideal for all Martial Arts and leisure activities. Whether worn when training, to or from the club or for general use, this convenient slip-on shoe combines a thin wedged shaped, rubber non-slip, sole for a comfortable fit and a circular pivot spot on the ball of the foot to allow for kicking and spinning techniques. High quality stitching is featured throughout the shoe with attention to stress points, ensuring resilience and durability. White shoe with black tongue, heel, sole and padded inside. Easy to wipe clean before and after use. Soft Nama Hide ™ Leather.
Feature1: Multi-functional shoe for Martial Arts or leisure
Feature2: Convenient slip-on shoe with non-slip rubber sole
Feature3: Pivot spot on sole for kicking and spinning skills
Feature4: Quality stitching with attention to stress points

Title: Blitz Apex Circular Strike Shield
Description: Designed for speed work, tight movements and accurate strikes, the Blitz Apex Circular Strike Shield is constructed to withstand the most powerful blows during countless training sessions. The two solid, conveniently placed, handles either side of the shield offers a secure hold whilst, allowing the holder to position themselves in a variety of tight angles. The perfect strike shield for a number of techniques and styles to be practiced, the circular target demands fast and precise punches or kicks from the striker. The high density foam core also provides the ultimate shock absorption, minimising the force felt by the holder. Easy to wipe clean before and after use. Nama Hide™ leather. Dimensions: 38cm high x 38cm wide x 8cm depth.

Title: Blitz Club Inner Gloves
Description:
The Blitz Club Inner Gloves are a convenient alternative to hand wraps when being worn under Boxing gloves, as well as suitable for being worn on their own for light Boxing workouts. These gloves provide additional protection to the knuckles, tendons and soft tissues of the hand when striking and defending. Wearing these inner gloves inside Boxing gloves leaves little space, offering a strong and firm grip when training or competing.

Made from Nylon with elastic, the inner gloves feature a thumb hole and separate finger slots to effectively support the whole hand. A Velcro wrap around wrist fastening is also included for a precise fit and further support to minimise unnecessary sprains and injuries. Great for reducing abrasion, cuts and blisters too.

Feature4: Velcro wrap around wrist strap for precise fit

Blitz Kids Defiant Polycotton Contact Trousers
Description:
Designed specifically for intense training and full-contact combat, the Blitz Defiant Kickboxing trousers are perfect for Martial Artists of all levels.

Constructed with a combination of high-quality materials of durable polyester and cotton, our trousers offer flexibility, comfort, and superior mobility. The built-in gusset allows for unrestricted movement, allowing Martial Artists to execute various kicks, strikes, and grappling techniques with ease. The trousers also feature an elastic waistband with an adjustable drawstring for a secure and personalised fit. This ensures that they stay in place, giving the wearer confidence whilst training.

To enhance durability, the trousers are double-stitched at the seams, for long-lasting wear and tear resistance. Available in a range of sizes and colour options, our Defiant Kickboxing Trousers include a single colour stripe on the outside of each leg with matching colour waistband. 65% polyester / 35% cotton.

Blitz Kids Defiant Polyester Contact Trousers
Description:
Designed for high intensity training and full contact combat, the Blitz Defiant Kickboxing Trousers are designed to meet the demands of all levels of Martial Artists.

Made from 100% durable polyester, these trousers deliver lightweight performance with enhanced moisture-wicking capabilities, ideal for maintaining comfort during long training sessions. The smooth fabric offers excellent freedom of movement, while the integrated gusset design allows for unrestricted kicking, striking and dynamic manoeuvres.

An elasticated waistband with an internal drawstring ensures a secure, personalised fit, keeping the trousers firmly in place through every session. Reinforced double stitched seams offer lasting durability, even under intense use.

Available in a variety of sizes and colour options, each pair features a bold single colour stripe down the outer leg and a matching waistband for a sharp, professional look.
Feature1: Black trousers with a colour stripe and waistband
Feature2: Gusset designed to give full range of movement
Feature3: Elasticated waist with drawstring for secure fit
Feature4: Double stitched at seams for added durability

Title: Blitz Kids Diamond Kata Karate Gi - 14oz
Description:
Introducing the Blitz Diamond Kata Karate Gi, meticulously crafted for advanced karate practitioners and esteemed instructors. This Gi showcases a traditional Japanese cut - with shorter sleeves and trousers and a shortened jacket lapel - designed to highlight and enable the high kicks and rapid movements that are integral to Karate.

The minimalist design presents a canvas for personalization, allowing you to proudly display your unique club logos and affiliations. Distinctive features include an elegantly woven Diamond label on the lapel and the top of the left leg, symbolizing the superior Blitz quality.

Made from 100% brushed cotton, this 14oz Gi delivers a lightweight feel while maintaining resilient strength, perfect for the rigors of Kata routines. The trousers are equipped with a convenient tie waist, ensuring a secure and comfortable fit, providing unrestricted movement and flexibility.

Blitz Dipped Foam Foot Guards
Description: Minimise the risk of injury and train in confidence with the incredibly lightweight Blitz Dipped Foam Foot Guards. Ideal for Karate, Taekwondo and other Martial Arts training, the shock absorbing foam foot guards offer great protection during kicking techniques. Made from a soft EVA foam dipped in PVC resin, and vacuum moulded to finish, the foot guards are contoured to cover the majority of the foot, with cut-outs around the achilles and instep for ease of movement. The tongue and heel of the guards feature ventilation holes for air flow and to prevent moisture build-up, keeping the wearer cool. The elasticated Velcro wrap-around strap provides a secure and comfortable fit. The bottom of the foot guard also includes two reinforced elasticated straps to hold the foot in place and, open areas at the heel, ball of the foot and toes for a solid grip on flooring. Easy to wipe clean before and after use.
Feature1: Minimise risk of injury and train in confidence
Feature2: Ventilation holes to prevent moisture build-up
Feature3: Velcro wrap-around strap for secure fit
Feature4: Open areas underneath foot for solid floor grip
Feature5: Soft EVA foam dipped in PVC resin

Title: Blitz Reversible Jigsaw Mat - Sample
Description:
Approximately 10cm x 10cm sample piece of our Reversible Jigsaw Mat, designed to give you an idea of the density, thickness and texture before purchasing the full product.

Our heavy duty jigsaw mats feature a reversible, two colour, interlocking design and are very easy to wipe clean before and after use. These mats have the ability to change your overall floor 'fight space' layout, by simply reversing the mats to switch colours.

The 20mm and 30mm mats include a textured micro-grid pattern whilst, our 40mm mat is a Tatami pattern. Constructed from a triple layer EVA foam. Hardness: 38 (Shore C) (40mm = 40). Density: 90kg/m3 (40mm = 100kg/m3). CE approved. Conforms to EU safety requirements EN 71-1:2011 including EU Flammability Classification EN 71-2:2011 and Chemical Testing Classification EN 71-3:2013.

Do not use harsh chemicals to clean the surface of these mats. Doing so will void its warranty.
Feature1: Approximately 10cm x 10cm sample piece
Feature2: An idea of density, thickness and texture
Feature3: Reversible, two colour, interlocking jigsaw mat

Blitz Superflex Sports Shoes
Description:
This super lightweight, incredibly flexible, quick-drying shoe is ideal for any activity. Much like socks, the stretchy material moulds to the shape of your foot perfectly, giving you the freedom of movement to perform any Martial Arts technique. The shoe can bend, roll and fold, whilst retaining its shape after use, providing a 'barefoot' experience.

The 5mm non-slip rubber sole offers the ultimate grip and stability, even when worn on the mat. The thickened rubber sole has excellent wear resistance and is also soft enough to prevent your toes from rubbing. The breathable, honeycomb insoles keep your feet cool and comfortable whilst also protecting your feet from cuts and scratches. Comes with a heel pull tab to slip shoes on and off easily.

Can also be worn for yoga, swimming, snorkelling, diving, kayaking, boating, beach walking and other water sports. Very easy to store. 80% Lycra / 20% polyester.
Feature1: Lightweight, flexible, quick-drying shoe
Feature2: Breathable, honeycomb, insoles for comfort

Feature4: Ideal for any activity giving freedom of movement
